definition.name: def-spectral-idempotent
definition.definition: For Phi: B(H)_sa -> B(H)_sa unital positive and almost idempotent, set S=2Phi-1 in End(B(H)_sa), R=(S^2)^(-1/2), sgn(S)=SR, and P=theta(2Phi-1)=(1/2)(1+sgn(S)). This is the spectral idempotent of Phi for the spectral cluster near 1; its properties (P^2=P, P(1)=1, real-linear, ||P-Phi||<=C eta, delta-positive) are the prior lemma lem-P-properties.
